# metadataIfAvailable

**Instance Property**

The item’s metadata if it is readily available.

## Declaration

```swift
var metadataIfAvailable: [String : Any]? { get }
```

## Discussion

If metadata is not readily available, accessing this property will send a message to the device requesting metadata for the file. The delegate of the device will be notified via method [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICCameraDeviceDelegate/cameraDevice(_:didReceiveMetadataFor:)], if this method is implemented by the delegate. Execution of the delegate callback will occur on the main thread.

## Requesting Metadata

- **requestMetadata()**: Requests metadata for the item.
- **metadata**: The item’s metadata.
- **flushMetadataCache()**: Deletes the item’s cached metadata.
- **ICCameraItemMetadataOption**: An option for the item’s metadata.
